scheduler.schedule.eventbridgeparameters: The templated target type for the EventBridge [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eventbridge/latest/APIReference/API_PutEvents.html](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eventbridge/latest/APIReference/API_PutEvents.html) API operation.

scheduler.schedule.eventbridgeparameters.Description: A free-form string, with a maximum of 128 characters, used to decide what fields to expect in the event detail.
